name: Countryballs: Rise of Europe
short_description: In this game you play for countries of the modern and old world, or create your own. 🔹 World generator - creates flags, borders and even whole new maps. 🔹 Smart AI - from diplomacy to revolutions, it will make every game interesting. 📜 Create your story, change the fate of the world
detailed_description:
Countryballs: Rise of Europe is a game that has two modes: strategic and sandbox. In the strategic mode, you play for the country, and must extract resources, for this you can build cities or deal with deforestation.

You also need to monitor the indicators of resources, because if you have a shortage of some resource, then crisis times will come and the country will become weak. You can also engage in the development of technology and expansion.

You can build your own empire, but consider the fact that with the large size of the country in you will fall the level of military power (support) due to the fact that regions appear in your country that are not loyal to your government, but you can compensate for this by counting faster technology development.

In sandbox mode (or observer) you are watching more countries for which AI plays. You can edit them: military power, form borders, force to attack other countries.

Also in the game there is a system of creating your own country.

music creator: Kevin MacLeod

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Ukrainian, Czech
